# Chintu Generated Files Map

**Stage:** 11 (cycle 4)
**Mode:** local-first, read-only reference

Single source of truth mapping every generated artifact to the script
that produces it. Complements `CHINTU_ARTIFACT_POLICY.md` (which
explains *when* to commit each artifact). This map is enforced by
`scripts/chintu-generated-files-map.test.js`.

If a script writes a file, that pair belongs here. If a file appears in
a generator but not in this map, the integrity test fails.

---

## 1. Generated, gitignored (overwrite freely)

These artifacts are rebuilt on every run and never need to be staged.

| Generated file | Generator script | Generator language |
|---|---|---|
| `last-validation.txt` | `scripts/chintu-validate.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `release-guard-report.md` | `scripts/chintu-release-guard.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `chintu-agent-board-report.md` | `scripts/chintu-agent-board.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `chintu-openclaw-readiness-report.md` | `scripts/chintu-openclaw-readiness.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `chintu-pre-memory-gate-report.md` | `scripts/chintu-pre-memory-gate.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `chintu-windows-reporter-report.md` | `scripts/chintu-windows-reporter.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `chintu-bridge-daily-export-report.md` | `scripts/chintu-bridge-daily-export.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `chintu-bridge-command-center-report.md` | `scripts/chintu-bridge-command-center.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `CHINTU_RUNTIME_HEALTH.md` | `scripts/chintu-runtime-health.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `CHINTU_HEARTBEAT.md` | `scripts/chintu-heartbeat.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `CHINTU_RESTART_RECOVERY.md` | `scripts/chintu-restart-recovery.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `CHINTU_BRIDGE_LOOP_REALITY_CHECK.md` | `scripts/chintu-bridge-loop-reality-check.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `CHINTU_DAILY_BRIEF.md` | `scripts/chintu-founder-message.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `CHINTU_OUTBOX/latest_founder_message.md` | `scripts/chintu-founder-message.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `CHINTU_OUTBOX/founder_message_history.md` | `scripts/chintu-founder-message.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `CHINTU_OUTBOX/dry_run_payloads/telegram_preview.json` | `scripts/chintu-message-dry-run.js` | Node |
| `CHINTU_OUTBOX/dry_run_payloads/slack_preview.json` | `scripts/chintu-message-dry-run.js` | Node |
| `CHINTU_OUTBOX/dry_run_payloads/discord_preview.json` | `scripts/chintu-message-dry-run.js` | Node |
| `CHINTU_ACTION_QUEUE.md` | `scripts/chintu-action-planner.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `CHINTU_APPROVAL_CENTER.md` | `scripts/chintu-action-planner.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `CHINTU_NEXT_OPERATOR_PROMPT.md` | `scripts/chintu-action-planner.ps1` | PowerShell |
| `CHINTU_OUTBOX/latest_action_plan.json` | `scripts/chintu-action-planner.ps1` | PowerShell |

---

## 2. Generated, tracked (review diff before commit)

These artifacts are kept in git so the dashboard and briefing surfaces
are visible without running anything. Small diffs (timestamps, commit
hashes) are expected after every run.

| Generated file | Generator script | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `CHINTU_AGENT_DASHBOARD.html` | `scripts/chintu-agent-dashboard.ps1` | static snapshot card grid |
| `CHINTU_CONTROL_ROOM_INDEX.html` | `scripts/chintu-control-room-index.ps1` | static index of safe commands |
| `CHINTU_OS_HEALTH_CHECK.md` | `scripts/chintu-os-health-check.ps1` | repo + scripts + reports status |
| `CHINTU_ALIVE_BRIEFING.md` | `scripts/chintu-alive-briefing.ps1` | plain-English daily briefing |
| `CHINTU_ACTION_QUEUE_TRACKED.md` | `scripts/chintu-action-planner.ps1` | stable tracked reference snapshot of planner shape |
| `CHINTU_APPROVAL_AUDIT.md` | `scripts/chintu-approval-audit.ps1` | tracked, append-only founder approval log |

---

## 3. Source files referenced by generators (read-only inputs)

For reference: generators read these files but never write them.

| Input file | Read by |
|---|---|
| `CHINTU_FOUNDER_COMMAND_MAP.md` | `chintu-control-room-index.ps1`, `chintu-command-map.test.js` |
| `CHINTU_MEMORY_VAULT/README.md` | `chintu-memory-vault.test.js`, `chintu-pre-memory-gate.ps1` |
| `CHINTU_AGENT_CONTROL_SHELL.md` | `chintu-agent-control-shell.test.js` |
| `package.json` / `manifest.webmanifest` | `chintu-validate.ps1`, `chintu-os-health-check.ps1` |

---

## 4. Out of scope

The following are **not** generated by any Chintu script and must not be
added here:

- Protected BALA app files (`app.js`, `index.html`, `styles.css`,
  `sw.js`, `coach.js`, `manifest.webmanifest`, `privacy.html`,
  `functions/api/coach.js`)
- Hand-authored docs (`CHINTU_START_HERE.md`, `CHINTU_HANDOFF.md`,
  `CHINTU_FOUNDER_COMMAND_MAP.md`, etc.)
- Memory vault contents (`CHINTU_MEMORY_VAULT/**.md`)
- iMac packages (`CHINTU_IMAC_PACKAGES/**`)

---

## 5. How the integrity test reads this map

`scripts/chintu-generated-files-map.test.js` parses sections 1 and 2 of
this document, builds the set of `(file, generator)` pairs, and:

1. Verifies each generator script exists in `scripts/`.
2. Verifies each *tracked* generated file exists at the repo root.
3. Verifies no protected BALA file appears as a generated output.

The test is wired into `scripts/chintu-release-guard.ps1` and the
master launcher. A drift between this map and the filesystem is a
release-blocking fail.

---

## 6. BALA safety footer

BALA is a health-awareness companion. It does not diagnose, treat,
predict, prevent, replace doctors, or provide emergency monitoring.
